hooks.command: in=$(cat); f=$(printf %s "$in" | python3 -c "import json,sys;print((json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *apps/*.ts|*apps/*.tsx|*packages/*.ts|*packages/*.tsx) n=$(wc -l < "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$n" -gt 400 ] && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"\u26a0\ufe0f %s now %s lines (>400 cap). Split into a focused module before committing \u2014 pre-commit will block it."}}' "$f" "$n";; esac; exit 0
